title: Message delivery backlog blocks customer notifications
incident_summary: Password reset and invoice messages are delayed while the delivery queue keeps growing.

alerts.title: Email queue backlog
alerts.content: Primary queue depth climbed from 3k to 94k messages.

alerts.title: Bounce rate notice
alerts.content: Bounce rate up by 1.1%, below SEV threshold.

logs.title: Queue consumer panic
logs.content: consumer pod crashed: panic in attachment sanitizer dependency.

logs.title: Provider throttle warning
logs.content: provider responded with soft throttle headers intermittently.

logs.title: Dead-letter queue growth
logs.content: dead-letter queue grew as backlog retried, but root signal remains consumer crash pattern.

runbook_snippets.title: Queue drain runbook
runbook_snippets.content: Restart consumer deployment and run backlog drain command with rate cap.

runbook_snippets.title: Template linting
runbook_snippets.content: Template linting is not a blocker for queue transport outages.

timeline_notes.title: Sanitizer library upgrade
timeline_notes.content: attachment-sanitizer upgraded in latest email worker image.

red_herrings: CRM newsletter campaign was scheduled but uses a separate bulk-sending pipeline.
true_root_cause: Email queue consumer crashed and blocked backlog processing
true_mitigation: Restart consumer and drain queue backlog safely
true_mitigation_aliases: recycle email consumer and run backlog drain
restart worker then process queued messages
